reference: How may I help you? So I've been having a lot of trouble in the last two weeks of especially this past week of just a lot of shortness of breath. OK, uh, the shortness of breath is it happening at rest or exertion and how much exertion? Uhm, I think it's happening mostly on exertion. Usually I'm able to walk around the house, no issues, go up and down stairs, but right now I'm pretty limited. I can't really go up and down stairs without getting really short of breath. So I would say one week ago is when this all kind of started. OK, and has it been getting any better, worse, or staying the same? I would say it's kind of getting worse. I'm coughing a lot more sputum up. I'm getting more and more short of breath. Now, I do have a call for like a very long time now I've I was diagnosed with COPD in my 60s. Probably like 10 years ago and but this seems to be just a much worse than my COPD. OK, sure it's been a lot worse in the last week it sounds like. OK. Uhm have you, are you able to lie flat? Like on your back without experiencing shorter breath, shortness of breath? Yeah, and when I'm resting or lying down or trying to sleep I don't get short of breath. OK, and have you ever had instances where you woke up in the middle of the night really short of breath and you had to sit up to catch your breath? Uh no, I don't think so. OK, have you noticed any leg swelling? No. OK, and you said that to you, so you've had a cough for awhile now, but it's gotten worse. This past week in your, are you bringing up sputum? Yeah, I'm bringing up a lot of materials. I think every time I cough I'm bringing some sputum up and right now the like usually the color is like clear to whitish but right now it's a bit more yellow. OK, so a change in the sputum color and also sounds like you're bringing up more sputum as well. Yeah. OK and have you brought up or coughed up any blood? So have you had any hemoptysis? No, nothing like that. OK, and have you had any wheezing? Uhm, I do but when I get short of breath I have some wheezing, but usually I don't. OK, but but you've had wheezing this past week though. Yeah. Yeah OK. And have you had any chest pain? Just when I'm coughing and getting short of breath, I do have some discomfort in my chest. OK, uh, do you feel that, or could you describe he the pains character? Like is it sharp, dull, or achy? It's more just an ache and it's kind of more of a discomfort than a pain, and it kind of goes away once my episode of coughing and shortness of breath is relieved with some rest. OK. It is sounding like a COPD exacerbation with the increasing and the change changing sputum.
